signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2.2%** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence

South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, missing market forecasts of 2.4% and remaining near the Bank of Korea's 2% target.[1] This figure aligns closely with rateinflation.com's 2.16% report for March, confirming contained price pressures amid
